description: Response schema for product-user-focus-group concept-test mode. Each synthetic instance returns this object.

preferred_concept.description: Name of the concept this instance prefers

preference_reason.description: Why this concept resonates — 2–4 sentences in first person

improvement.description: One thing that would make the preferred concept better

dealbreaker.description: One thing that would make this persona walk away from the entire category

verbatim.description: A single representative quote capturing the core preference or concern
